visual_description: A cloaked figure darts across a stone courtyard in front of a towering castle with illuminated arches, while other robed figures stand on the steps. A massive explosion erupts near the walls, sending debris and fire into the air as people scramble away. The view widens to show the castle shrouded in smoke and flames, with a figure on a balcony watching the destruction.
audio_description: The audio is dominated by loud explosions and chaotic shouts, with the crackle of fire audible.
